@startuml
!define CLASS(name, icon, fields)
  [name]
  icon
  fields
  [
!endmacro

CLASS User, C, "String userName\nString password"
CLASS Tenant, C, "String name"
CLASS Cloud, C, "String endpoint"
CLASS Api, C, "String driver"
CLASS CloudCredential, C, "String userName\nString secret"
CLASS Resource, A, "String id\nString name"
CLASS Image, C, "String id\nString name"
CLASS Hardware, C, "String id\nString name\nint cores\nint ram\nint disk"
CLASS Location, C, "String id\nString name\nboolean isAssignable"
CLASS OperatingSystem, C, ""
CLASS HardwareOffer, C, ""
CLASS GeoLocation, C, ""
CLASS LocationScope, E, "REGION,\nZONE,\nHOST"

@enduml
